description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named JavaScript that runs on pull requests, pushes to main, and workflow dispatches. The workflow should have a FORCE_COLOR environment variable set to 3. It should have four jobs: benchmark, build, test, and lint. Each job should run on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and windows-latest environments, checking out the repository, setting up JavaScript with a custom action, and then running a specific yarn command in the javascript directory.
